channel.title: lifting on Layle's Lair
channel.description: Recent content in lifting on Layle's Lair

item.title: Instrumenting binaries using revng and LLVM
item.description: One of the first things I ever wanted to implement was an import hooking library that placed the hooks by rewriting the calls statically instead of hooking the functions in-memory.

item.title: Lifting binaries to LLVM with McSema
item.description: This post will guide you through my set up and we’ll explore what worked and what didn’t (maybe it works for you!).
